en: One of them is like a horse. That could be fun.
Hey, you guys ready to meet with Rami? Oh, yeah, yeah. Send him in. Totally.
Rami. What's up, man? How are you guys? Pretty good.
Pretty good. Hi, buddy. How's it going? Good.
How you doing? Good, good. Yeah, first time hosting SNL.
How's it going? Yeah, exciting, right? I'm almost through the first week. Yeah.
And the whole time, I feel like I've been on good behavior.
ko: 그리고 내내, 착하게 행동한 것 같아.

en: Yeah, dude, you've been killing it, man. Yeah, yeah.
ko: 응, 야, 진짜 잘하고 있어. 응, 응, 응.

en: So it feels like I deserve a treat.
ko: 그래서 보상을 받을 자격이 있는 것 같아.

en: What's that? A treat for being on good behavior.
You know, like a cookie or a toy. Oh, yeah.
ko: 있잖아, 쿠키나 장난감 같은 거. 아, 그래.

en: It just feels like if there's no reward,
why should I be on good behavior at all?
That's a good question. No, yeah.
ko: 안 돼, 안 돼, 안 돼.

en: How about my mouse pad? Ben's mouse pad.
That could be fun, right? I'll put that in my house. Yeah.
Hey, we have this idea for you. I'd like another treat.
Man, I don't know if we have more treats for you. Seriously, dude. Fine.
ko: 야, 더 줄 보상이 있는지 모르겠어. 진심으로. 좋아.

en: Well, in that case, I guess I'll just be on bad behavior.
ko: 그러면, 나쁘게 행동할 수밖에 없겠네. 뭐?

en: Are you kidding me, Mr. Robot? Come on, man. Rami, no.
Rami, no. No. Oh, my God. Don't go in the fridge. No.
Is this your food? Do not touch that tortellini. Don't touch Rami.
Oh, my God. I want more treats. Uh-uh. Rami?
Uh-uh, Rami. Oh, my God. That's his nose.
I could hit him. We promise never. A song can be a treat. A song?
I know in that hotline bling, that can only mean one thing.
ko: 그 핫라인 블링에서, 그건 한 가지만 의미해.

en: Rami, I'm going to freak out. No! Be careful.
ko: Rami, 나 미쳐버릴 것 같아. 안 돼! 조심해.

en: Do not touch the roof. Rami, just give me more treats. Oh, sure. I'll give you a treat.
Give you a one-way trip to hell. Martin, no. No, I'm thinking about it. Don't do that.
ko: 지옥행 편도 티켓. Martin, 안 돼.

en: I'm honestly thinking about it. Don't. No, Rami. No, no, no, no, no.
ko: 진짜 고민 중이야. 안 돼, Rami.

en: Why are you acting like this?
Because I'm scared.
SNL's almost over, and after this, I'm going to have to go out into the real world.
ko: SNL이 거의 끝나가고, 이 후에 진짜 세상으로 나가야 하잖아.

en: Rami, sweetheart, you're going to do great.
But I'm really going to miss you guys.
ko: 근데 너희가 정말 보고 싶을 거야.

en: You're going to make so many new friends.
ko: 새 친구 엄청 많이 사귈 거야.

en: And we'll still be here for you. So what do you say we just...
ko: 그리고 우린 항상 여기 있을 거야. 그러니까 우리 그냥...

en: Oh, come on, man! I should have shot him.
